name: visualhyper-codex-panel
description: Local-first Kanvis Studio workspace for opening, inspecting, editing, and rendering video projects.

interface.shortDescription: Open and edit local Kanvis video projects inside Codex.
interface.longDescription: Kanvis Studio provides a project-local canvas and timeline for opening Agent-generated video projects, inspecting outputs, adjusting declared layers and parameters, and rendering verified MP4 files.
defaultPrompt: Open Kanvis Studio fullscreen inside Codex for this project.
Open the latest Kanvis Video project in Kanvis Studio.
Show the current Kanvis Studio project status.
